Enabled.title: News
Enabled.description: Enable/ disable news pages for the store

UseNewsPrefixInLinks.title: Using "news" prefix in links
UseNewsPrefixInLinks.description: Add the "news" prefix to article links (only for articles with active SEO)

UseStoreDefaultLanguage.title: Using store's default language while searching articles
UseStoreDefaultLanguage.description: Show articles in the store's default language if a localization for the user's language doesn't exist
